ogTitle: Smiths Beach vs Smiths Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Smiths Beach and Smiths Gully.
heading: Smiths Beach vs Smiths Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Smiths Beach, Victoria and Smiths Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Smiths Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Smiths Beach (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Smiths Beach or Smiths Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Smiths Beach has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Smiths Gully scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Smiths Beach scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Smiths Gully scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Smiths Beach or Smiths Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Smiths Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
